allow: Bash(python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('第八届下分杯选手池.xlsx'\); ws = wb.active; print\('列名:', [cell.value for cell in ws[1]]\); print\('第一行数据:', [cell.value for cell in ws[2]]\)")
